Hi,

R 3.2.2 refused to download some libraries because of old version.

I tested version 3.2.3 on 'FreeBSD shkatula 10.3-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 10.3-PRERELEASE #0 r295099: Sun Jan 31 20:57:29 CET 2016     root@shkatula:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64'.

Marko
